A.text: Both the North and South Pacific are mostly warming.

B.text: The North Pacific is mostly warming, while the South Pacific is mostly cooling.

C.text: The North Pacific is mostly unchanged or cooling, while the South Pacific is mostly warming.

D.text: Both the North and South Pacific are mostly unchanged.

parsed.answer_value: The North Pacific is mostly unchanged or cooling, while the South Pacific is mostly warming.
parsed.rationale: The North Pacific shows a mix of colors, with more blues and greens indicating cooling or no change, while the South Pacific has more reds and oranges, indicating warming.
